mainEntity.name: Is falling from ladder considered OSHA recordable in Riverton UT?
mainEntity.text: Is falling from ladder considered OSHA recordable in Riverton UT?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, any work-related ladder fall requiring medical treatment beyond first aid is OSHA recordable; employers must report fatalities within 8 hours, in-patient within 24.

suggestedAnswer.text: Riverton sites trigger Form 301/300 logging. Use OSHA citation leverage in comp negotiations. Ladder falls violate 1926.1053—fines up to $15K motivate settlements. Request employer's safety records via discovery.

name: OSHA Rules for Ladder Falls in Riverton
